task: Type-3 DFIG external LVRT scaffold progress upload

uploaded_snapshot.contents: current 3IBR PSCAD project with LOWV, IMMTRIP, CLEAR, TIMER_S, and build-safe VSMIN feedback-memory scaffold plus DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM output channel

VIBR1_2.source: P3 multimeter at Type-3 branch 22 kV collector-side upstream of BRK_DFIG

implemented_monitoring_scaffold.meaning: 1 when VIBR1_2 is at or below the immediate trip threshold region
1 when the low-voltage event is inactive; used to clear the resettable integrator
continuous low-voltage event elapsed time in seconds

implemented_monitoring_scaffold.source: feedback-memory signal produced by the reset selector output through a Feedback Loop Selector
implemented_monitoring_scaffold.meaning: build-safe VSMIN feedback-memory output; not yet dynamically validated as the event minimum voltage latch
limitations: The prior Unused-source Build error was resolved by separating the feedback memory signal as DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM.
The output channel was added after the last 8 s run, so no dynamic VSMIN_MEM waveform has yet been verified.
Do not treat this signal as confirmed Vs_min_latched until the new output is verified in an 8 s run.

build_check.note: Latest manual Build after adding the DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM output channel showed 0 errors. The two warnings are the previously audited XFMR_DFIG_22_33 floating-terminal warnings. This confirms static Build safety only, not VSMIN memory dynamics.

not_implemented_yet: dynamic validation and formal confirmation of DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM as Vs_min_latched
safety_notes: The scaffold is monitoring-only and does not command BRK_DFIG.
DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM is build-safe but is not yet a dynamically validated latched minimum voltage.
No actual PSCAD LVRT trip has been implemented yet.
Future BRK_DFIG command synthesis must preserve the confirmed 0=closed, 1=open semantics.
recommended_next_steps: Run the configured 8 s, 0.10 ohm, 2.0 s / 0.75 s fault case to verify DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM minimum tracking, hold, and reset behavior.
Promote DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_MEM to confirmed Vs_min_latched only after the new output waveform passes that check.
Add tVRT calculation and duration_exceeded comparator only after Vs_min_latched is stable.
Add trip_latch monitoring before connecting any breaker command.
Only after monitoring validation should BRK_DFIG command synthesis be discussed.
historical_scope_note: A later unattended full-monitoring attempt on 2026-06-27 safely fell back and restored this Build=0 VSMIN scaffold state. The historical scaffold facts in this file are unchanged.
